risks.title: Sensex gains 394 points, Nifty at 23,242 as PSU banks lead fag-end rally
risks.description: Indian markets closed firmly higher on 9 June, with PSU banks surging over 3% in a fag-end rally triggered partly by US President Trump's Iran peace-talk signals. While IT and media dragged, the breadth was strong — mid- and small-caps outpaced the benchmarks…

risks.title: 31,000 MTET qualified aspirants left waiting; JNC demands immediate recruitment of 677 teacher posts
risks.description: Thousands of Meghalaya youths who have cleared the Meghalaya Teachers Eligibility Test (MTET) are still waiting for an opportunity to secure a teaching job, with many now nearing or crossing the upper age limit. Raising concerns over both unemployment and the…

risks.title: Apple-sized rocks four kilometres below the central Pacific Ocean contain more cobalt and manganese than all known land deposits combined, and mining companies are now racing to extract them from one of the least-explored ecosystems on Earth, where over 90 per cent of the local species are still undescribed.
risks.description: The region is called the Clarion-Clipperton Zone. It is approximately six million square kilometres of abyssal plain stretching between Mexico and Hawaii, roughly the width of the continental United States, with an average depth of around 5,000 metres. The se…

risks.title: In praise of Ben Brown
risks.description: The Cubs right-hander has taken his game to a new level.

risks.title: KTC M27T6S review
risks.description: This budget KTC does local dimming better than many much pricier mini-LED panels.

timeline.event: Sensex gains 394 points, Nifty at 23,242 as PSU banks lead fag-end rally
31,000 MTET qualified aspirants left waiting; JNC demands immediate recruitment of 677 teacher posts

Apple-sized rocks four kilometres below the central Pacific Ocean contain more cobalt and manganese than all known land deposits combined, and mining companies are now racing to extract them from one of the least-explored ecosystems on Earth, where over 90 per cent of the local species are still undescribed.
